channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Trump says he'll nominate Kash Patel as FBI director to remake the agency. Here's what happens next
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President-elect Donald Trump’s stunning announcement that he will nominate Kash Patel as FBI director sets the stage for a fresh round of turbulence at a law enforcement agency tasked with protecting the homeland and investigating federal crimes.
item.dc:creator: ERIC TUCKER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Wisconsin Democratic leader Ben Wikler enters the race to lead the national party
item.description: WEST PALM BEACH, Fla. (AP) — Ben Wikler, chair of the Democratic Party in Wisconsin, said Sunday he has joined the race to lead the national party after an election that swept Donald Trump and Republicans to power in Washington.
item.dc:creator: FATIMA HUSSEIN, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: What the cost-of-living adjustment increase in Social Security means
item.description: A 2.5% cost-of-living adjustment increase will mean an extra $50 a month for most Social Security and SSI recipients.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Arnold, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump nominates Kash Patel to lead FBI
item.description: President-elect Trump plans to nominate Kash Patel to serve as head of the FBI, elevating a staunch ally and controversial figure who sparked internal battles during the first Trump administration.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Social Security reforms face uncertain future in Senate
item.description: A House-passed bill to reform aspects of Social Security is lingering in the Senate as questions bubble up over its path forward.
item.dc:creator: Aris Folley, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Massive Theodore Roosevelt Presidential Library to open in North Dakota Badlands
item.description: The Theodore Roosevelt Presidential Library Foundation plans to open a massive state-of-the-art presidential library built on over 90 acres in the North Dakota Badlands.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Democrats look to governors to lead them to promised land
item.description: Democrats are looking to the governors of blue states as both a line of defense against the incoming Trump administration and a promising bench for the party in 2028.
item.dc:creator: Julia Mueller, NewsNation

item.title: Trump tariffs threaten to crack open North American economies
item.description: MEXICO CITY — President-elect Trump’s pledge to impose tariffs on Mexico and Canada threatens to upend decades of North American integration, a bumpy process that’s recast the two U.S. neighbors as providers of raw and finished goods for the world’s biggest economy.
item.dc:creator: Rafael Bernal, NewsNation

item.title: Canada is already examining tariffs on certain US items following Trump's tariff threat
item.description: TORONTO (AP) — Canada is already examining possible retaliatory tariffs on certain items from the United States should President-elect Donald Trump follow through on his threat to impose sweeping tariffs on Canadian products, a senior official said Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: ROB GILLIES, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Walz, agriculture leaders celebrate Minnesota turkey production, show concern over tariffs
item.description: DFL Gov. Tim Walz continued the tradition of celebrating Minnesota’s nation-leading position when it comes to turkey production. He also addressed preliminary concerns of tariffs promised by President-elect Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: Clay Masters, MPR News

item.title: Trump's tariffs may be targeted at others — but they could impact you too
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump threatened to slap hefty tariffs on China, Canada and Mexico. Those tariffs would hurt America too — if they are carried out.
item.dc:creator: Scott Horsley, MPR News

item.title: Post-election poll: Trump victory, cabinet choices, war, and aliens through voters' eyes
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump's popularity is on the rise and the voters who went against him think World War III is likely.
item.dc:creator: Greg Haas, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Walmart becomes latest — and biggest — company to roll back its DEI policies
item.description: Conservative groups have filed lawsuits against workplace diversity initiatives that prioritize historically marginalized groups.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: State bar counsel filed 2 complaints against Clark County Commissioner Justin Jones
item.description: The office of the state bar counsel, in its effort to discipline Clark County Commissioner Justin Jones, filed a complaint in February 2024 and another in October where it alleges Jones violated several rules of professional conduct, according to documents the 8 News Now Investigators have obtained.
item.dc:creator: Kyle J. Paine, KLAS, CBS News
